title: PayPal Tumbles 10% Despite Q1 Earnings Beat: Is The Venmo Spin-off Enough To Save The Stock
text: PayPal shares tumbled 10% despite posting Q1 2026 earnings beat. Beat both EPS and revenue estimates with non-GAAP EPS of $1.34 and revenue of $8.35 billion. Stock sell-off reflected concerns about decelerating growth and margin pressure. Full-year 2026 guidance called for low-single-digit decline to slightly positive non-GAAP EPS growth. Reorganization into three units aims to unlock value particularly through Venmo spin-off. Investors questioned execution risk and timing.
